metadata.title: Hailuo 2.3 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Hailuo 2.3 by MiniMax. High-fidelity AI video generation model designed to create realistic motion, expressive characters, and cinematic visuals with stability and consistency.

hero.title: Hailuo 2.3
hero.description: MiniMax's high-fidelity AI video generation model. Create realistic motion, expressive characters, and cinematic visuals with stability and consistency.

introduce.title: About Hailuo 2.3
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Hailuo 2.3 is MiniMax's high-fidelity AI video generation model designed to create realistic motion, expressive characters, and cinematic visuals. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video, handling complex movements, lighting changes, and detailed facial expressions with stability and consistency.

items.title: Realistic Motion
items.description: Generate videos with natural and realistic motion dynamics.

items.title: Expressive Characters
items.description: Create characters with detailed facial expressions and emotions.

items.title: Cinematic Visuals
items.description: Professional-grade cinematic video output with lighting effects.

items.title: Stable Generation
items.description: Consistent and stable video generation with high quality.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Hailuo 2.3 a leading AI video generation model.

items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with cinematic quality.

items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Video To Video
items.description: Edit and transform existing videos with AI-powered enhancement.

items.title: Complex Movements
items.description: Handle complex movements and lighting changes with stability.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

items.title: What is Hailuo 2.3?
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 is MiniMax's high-fidelity AI video generation model with realistic motion and expressive characters.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes.

items.title: Who created Hailuo 2.3?
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 is created by MiniMax, a leading AI company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 excels at realistic motion, expressive characters, and stable generation with cinematic visuals.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Hailuo 2.3 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What about facial expressions?
items.description: Hailuo 2.3 handles detailed facial expressions with stability and consistency.

cta.title: Ready to Try Hailuo 2.3?
cta.description: Experience MiniMax's high-fidelity video generation. Create videos with expressive characters.
